result.summary: I found 2 visually noticeable issues: the fixed bottom navigation is covering part of the game content, and some horizontally scrollable sections are clipped at the screen edges with partially cut-off labels/cards.

issues.description: The fixed bottom navigation overlaps the lower game row, obscuring part of the thumbnails and making the bottom content look cut off.
issues.suggestion: Add sufficient bottom padding/margin to the page content so it clears the fixed nav bar, or make the bottom navigation non-overlapping on this screen size.

issues.description: Some carousel items are partially cut off at the right edge, including a truncated category label ('Hot Ga...') and partially visible game tiles.
issues.suggestion: Increase horizontal padding, adjust the carousel viewport, or ensure clipped items are clearly indicated as scrollable so the partial cut-off looks intentional.
